title: Analytics - Device Added
scenario: Log an event with device details upon successful pairing and verify dashboard elements update after a few hours.
steps: Check the event logs for the paired device.
Verify the event includes device name, device PID, and device serial.
Check the 'Events in the last 30 minutes' element.
Check the 'Event count by country' element.
Check the 'Event count by gender' element.
Re-check the event counts on the dashboard.
expected: An event is logged with device name, device PID, and device serial. The default dashboard displays a graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment. Event counts are updated after a few hours.
